# agents.txt Standard

> The open specification for AI agent capability declarations. Layer 4 of the agent-readiness stack.

## Specification
- [agents.txt Standard v1.0-draft](https://agentstxt.dev): The open specification for AI agent capability declarations. Covers file format, directives, discovery, payment protocols (x402, MPP), authorization (agent-auth), MCP endpoint declaration, and skills. Layer 4 of the agent-readiness stack.

## Demos
- [Demos index](https://agentstxt.dev/demo): Live demonstrations of every capability the spec advertises.
- [Agent Auth demo](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/auth): 7-step Ed25519 + JWT handshake against the agent-auth Cloudflare Worker.
- [MCP demo](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/mcp): Streamable HTTP MCP session: initialize, tools/list, get_spec, validators.
- [Payments demo](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/payments): Live x402 v2 + MPP payment flow against the /donate endpoint.
- [Skills demo](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/skills): agents.json skills index → MCP get_skill → installable skill package.
- [Content declarations demo](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/llms): Renders /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt content live from this server.
- [File Generator](https://agentstxt.dev/demo/generate): Browser-only configurator that emits agents.txt + agents.json from form input.
